item.title: The Munich conference ended the post-war order, says Ray Dalio. How to invest if great powers collide.
item.description: Protecting wealth in times of war is difficult as normal economic activity is curtailed and governments print money and borrow heavily to fund its mil...

item.title: The great rotation: Why this fund manager is pivoting from the U.S. toward Europe
item.description: One fund manager with a global mandate is significantly underweight U.S. assets in favor of the opportunities created in Europe by the reshaping of mi...

item.title: Is the stock market open Monday for Presidents Day? Will USPS, FedEx and UPS make deliveries?
item.description: Here’s how trading hours and other services will be affected on the federal holiday, which falls on Monday, Feb. 16, this year.

item.title: Crypto investors who don’t fill out this new tax form the right way could overpay on their taxes
item.description: Crypto investors can expect to receive a new tax form this year from exchanges such as Coinbase and Robinhood.

item.title: Rents are finally falling in some parts of the country. Here’s who is actually feeling the relief.
item.description: Rents fell nationally in January, but they’re still at a high level due to a sharp run-up over the last few years.
